title: Bonney Sees Kuma’s Memories
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Sabo, Unknown person #1, Dragon, Unknown person #2, Ivankov, Unknown person #3 as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Requesting Backup! The Toomi uprising in the South Blue is looking bleak!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ve can't! Our hands are full...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be rash, Kuma! You've been actingk reckless...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where did you come from?! State your name!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems she caught the eye of a celestial dragon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They took her on a govern- ment ship...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...because the celestial dragon wanted to make her his bride!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: It was the revolutionary army again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The enemy took us by surprise....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Finally, after three years of struggling....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We couldn't have done it without the revolutionary army!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Here's to the Revo- Lutionary Army!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've worn myself out, I'll have to return by ship.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since Commander Ginny of the Revolutionary Army was kidnapped...

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: ...to be Wed to a celestial dragon...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: KJMA!! It's GINNY!! She's on the line right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kumach!!! I finally made it back to the surface!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They didn't want me around after I got sick... I was thrown away.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wanted to see everyone one last time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but this call will have to be our goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you talking about, Ginny?! Where are you?! I can be there in an instant!! I was afraid I'd never see you again!!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney’s Tragedy through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
